description: Create a classic Auditory P300 Oddball experiment in PsychoPy Builder for an EEG study. The experiment, located at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/p300_oddball.psyexp, must implement a trial loop using a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/oddball_conditions.csv. This file must specify Standard trials (80% probability, 440Hz, Trigger 10) and Target trials (20% probability, 880Hz, Trigger 20) with columns for frequency, condition type, and trigger code. Each trial must consist of a 0.2s sound, a keyboard response, and a parallel port trigger (address 0x0378) that activates at the exact onset of the sound using the trigger code variable.
